sqlMap.select: select * from RealEstateSuppLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.insert: insert into RealEstateSuppLW(VersionSequence, PolicyKey ApproxNumberOfPurchaseForResi ApproxNumberOfPurchaseForComm LargestPurchaseForResi LasrgestPurchaseForComm IsApplRenderedRealPropMatters IsFirmRequireInvestOfEnvRisks LastUpdateUserID LastUpdateTimeStamp IsApplPerfEscowServices ) values (#VersionSequence:NUMERIC#, #PolicyKey:NUMERIC# #ApproxNumberOfPurchaseForResi# #ApproxNumberOfPurchaseForComm# #LargestPurchaseForResi# #LasrgestPurchaseForComm# #IsApplRenderedRealPropMatters# #IsFirmRequireInvestOfEnvRisks# #LastUpdateUserID# #LastUpdateTimeStamp# #IsApplPerfEscowServices# )
sqlMap.select: select ApproxNumberOfPurchaseForResi, ApproxNumberOfPurchaseForComm, LargestPurchaseForResi, LasrgestPurchaseForComm, IsApplRenderedRealPropMatters, IsFirmRequireInvestOfEnvRisks, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp, IsApplPerfEscowServices, VersionSequence, PolicyKey from RealEstateSuppLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.update:
update RealEstateSuppLW set
ApproxNumberOfPurchaseForResi = #ApproxNumberOfPurchaseForResi# ApproxNumberOfPurchaseForResi = null ApproxNumberOfPurchaseForComm = #ApproxNumberOfPurchaseForComm# ApproxNumberOfPurchaseForComm = null LargestPurchaseForResi = #LargestPurchaseForResi# LargestPurchaseForResi = null LasrgestPurchaseForComm = #LasrgestPurchaseForComm# LasrgestPurchaseForComm = null IsApplRenderedRealPropMatters = #IsApplRenderedRealPropMatters# IsApplRenderedRealPropMatters = null IsFirmRequireInvestOfEnvRisks = #IsFirmRequireInvestOfEnvRisks# IsFirmRequireInvestOfEnvRisks = null LastUpdateUserID = #LastUpdateUserID# LastUpdateUserID = null LastUpdateTimeStamp = #LastUpdateTimeStamp# LastUpdateTimeStamp = null IsApplPerfEscowServices = #IsApplPerfEscowServices# IsApplPerfEscowServices = null
where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.delete: delete from RealEstateSuppLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
delete from RealEstateSuppLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.select: select ApproxNumberOfPurchaseForResi, ApproxNumberOfPurchaseForComm, LargestPurchaseForResi, LasrgestPurchaseForComm, IsApplRenderedRealPropMatters, IsFirmRequireInvestOfEnvRisks, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp, IsApplPerfEscowServices, VersionSequence, PolicyKey from RealEstateSuppLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#

select VersionSequence, PolicyKey, ApproxNumberOfPurchaseForResi, ApproxNumberOfPurchaseForComm, LargestPurchaseForResi, LasrgestPurchaseForComm, IsApplRenderedRealPropMatters, IsFirmRequireInvestOfEnvRisks, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp, IsApplPerfEscowServices from RealEstateSuppLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
